name: zip-lookup
description: Look up city, state, and coordinates for any US ZIP code or postal code in 60+ countries. Use for questions like 'what city is ZIP code 97201', 'where is postal code 10001', 'look up ZIP 90210'. The country code and postal code are appended to the URL path.

input.description: Country code and postal code as URL path segments (e.g. 'us/97201', 'de/10115', 'gb/EC1A'). Use lowercase two-letter country codes.

output.description: JSON with 'post code', 'country', 'country abbreviation', and 'places' array. Each place has 'place name', 'longitude', 'state', 'state abbreviation', and 'latitude'.
